title: Regular expression quantifiers and character classes should be preferred concisely
description: A regular expression is a sequence of characters that specifies a match pattern in text. Among the most important concepts are: Character classes: defines a set of characters, any one of which can occur in an input string for a match to succeed. Quantifiers: used to specify how many instances of a character, group, or character class must be present in the input for a match.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Use concise quantifiers like {n} instead of repeating character classes or quantifiers
